create.alreadyRegistered: You already have a registered wallet. Click the login button below to log in.
create.error: Error during registration, please try again

new.phone: Use a QR code to connect

sso.description: Frak does not store any personal or biometric data. By continuing you accept our <conditionsLink>terms</conditionsLink> and our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.

pairing.title: Sign in with my mobile
pairing.description: Scan this QR code to sign in from your mobile.

sso.redirect: You will be redirected to {{ productName }} in a few seconds.
sso.subTitle: to immediately receive your winnings from <pLink>{{productName}}</pLink>.
sso.title: Create your wallet

profile.notificationDeniedHelp: Notifications blocked by browser. Enable them in browser settings.

addEmail.title: Add an email
addEmail.description: Protect your wallet and recover your access if you lose or change device.

verifyEmail.title: Validate your email
verifyEmail.description: Confirm your email address so it can be used to recover your wallet.

setupRecovery.title: Set up recovery
setupRecovery.description: Add a recovery option so you can always restore access to your wallet.

updateRecovery.title: Update recovery options
updateRecovery.description: Your recovery expires soon. Refresh it to keep your wallet protected.

secured.description: Your email and recovery are all set. Your wallet is fully protected.

addEmail.title: Add your email
addEmail.description: Your email is only used to recover your account if you forget it. It will never be used to send you unsolicited messages.
addEmail.label: Email
addEmail.submitError: Unable to save this email right now. Please try again.
addEmail.alreadyUsed: This email address is already in use and can't be added. Try a different one.

conflict.title: Email already in use
conflict.description: This email is already linked to another wallet. Use a different email or come back later.
conflict.descriptionMergeable: This email is already on another of your accounts. You can combine them into one. We'll guide you through, whether the other account is on this device or another one.

card.title: Add your email
card.description: Add your email to be able to recover your wallet later.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the 6-digit code we email you to confirm your address. You can paste it or tap the button in the email.
verifyEmail.pasteError: Couldn't read the clipboard. Paste or type the code manually.

verifying.title: Verifying your email…
verifying.description: Hang tight while we confirm your code.

error.expired: This code has expired. Send a new one.
error.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Send a new code.
error.network: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.send: Couldn't send the code. Please try again.

success.title: Email verified
success.description: {{email}} is now verified. Set up recovery next so you can recover your account if you ever lose access.

changeEmail.title: Change your email
changeEmail.description: Enter a new email address. We'll send a code to verify it; your current email stays active until then.
changeEmail.label: Email
changeEmail.alreadyUsed: This email address is already in use. Try a different one.

peerWaiting.title: Approve on your other device
peerWaiting.description: We sent the request to your paired device. Confirm it there and we'll continue automatically.

discovery.title: Combine your accounts
discovery.description: Pick how you want to confirm: on this device, or on the device that holds your other passkey.
discovery.scanHint: Scan this code with the device that has your other account.

localHint.title: Both passkeys on this device?
localHint.body: Tap above to confirm with the passkey of your other account here. Works automatically if you use iCloud Keychain across your devices.

discovery.localError: We couldn't find the other passkey on this device. Try scanning the code with your other device instead.

preview.title: Combine your accounts
preview.description: We found another account of yours using {{email}}. Here's what will move when you combine them. No changes happen until you confirm.
preview.loadingDescription: We're double-checking both accounts before we show you what will move.
preview.errorDescription: Something went wrong while preparing the combine. Please try again.

gains.title: What you'll get
gains.description: {{referrals}} referrals, {{interactions}} interactions and {{assets}} reward events, all on one account.

funds.title: Funds to move
funds.description: We'll transfer these from your other account to your primary account before combining.

migrate.loadingDescription: We need to know what's on your other account before we move it.
migrate.readyDescription: Tap below to transfer everything from your other account to your primary account in one go.
migrate.title: Moving your funds…
migrate.description: Sending everything to your primary account before we finalise the combine. This takes a few seconds.
migrate.errorDescription: Something interrupted the transfer. Your accounts are safe. Tap retry to try again with the latest balances.
migrate.summaryErrorDescription: Tap retry. We need this before we can move your funds.
migrate.summaryError: Loading your balances failed. Tap retry to try again.
migrate.pending: Sending the transfer on-chain. Hang tight.
migrate.error: The transfer didn't go through. Tap retry. We'll re-check your balances and try again.

consent.title: Confirm with your other passkey
consent.description: We need a quick confirmation with the passkey from the other account to make sure both belong to you. You'll see a system prompt.

help.title: What happens here
help.description: Your device will ask you to confirm with face, fingerprint or PIN, same as when you log in. We never see your biometrics.

consent.error: We couldn't confirm with the other passkey on this device. Make sure it's available here, then try again.

remote.title: Confirm on your other device
remote.description: Scan this QR code with the device that holds your other passkey and approve the prompt there. We'll continue automatically.
remote.error: We couldn't reach your other device. Try again, or pick a different email.

sign.title: Authorise the combine
sign.description: One last confirmation to bring your two accounts together.
sign.errorDescription: Something interrupted the combine. Your accounts are safe. Try again to finish.
sign.error: The combine couldn't be authorised. Tap try again. Your accounts are safe.

settling.title: Combining your accounts…
settling.description: We're putting everything together. This usually takes a few seconds.
settling.errorDescription: Something slipped on our side after you authorised. Tap retry. Your accounts are safe.

progress.title: Working on it…
progress.body: Linking your accounts, transferring referrals and rewards. Hang tight.

settling.error: The combine couldn't finish. Tap retry. We'll pick up where we left off.

invalidConsent.title: Confirmation expired
invalidConsent.body: Too much time passed since you confirmed with your other passkey. Reconfirm to continue. Your accounts are safe.

onChainMismatch.title: Something looks different
onChainMismatch.body: Your accounts moved while we were combining them. Let's start over from the preview. Nothing is lost.

migrateReverted.title: Funds didn't move
migrateReverted.body: The transfer didn't land on-chain. Run it again to finish. Your accounts are safe.

success.title: Your accounts are now one
success.description: {{email}} is linked to your wallet. Everything from your other account moved over: referrals, history, rewards.

invite.title: Invite your friends to Frak
invite.description: Create your code and share it with your loved ones to earn even more money.

enterCode.title: Enter a referral code
enterCode.description: Earn money on every purchase you make across all partner sites.

create.title: My referral code
create.description: As soon as someone signs up with your code and places an order on one of our partner sites, you both earn money.
create.label: Customize your code
create.hint: Pick 4 letters to generate your code.
create.errorAlreadyActive: You already have an active referral code.
create.errorCodeUnavailable: This code is no longer available, please pick another one.
create.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
create.terms: By sharing or using a code, you agree to <termsLink>FRAK's terms and conditions</termsLink>.

share.shareText: Use my referral code {{code}} to sign up on Frak.

edit.title: Edit my code
edit.attentionBody: Changing your code revokes the previous one. Links you've already shared will stop working.

cancelConfirm.title: Discard changes
cancelConfirm.description: Your current code will be kept. Your changes won't be saved.

redeem.title: Got a referral code?
redeem.description: Enter a friend's or creator's code and you'll both benefit.
redeem.label: Referral code
redeem.errorNotFound: This code does not exist. Make sure it's correct.
redeem.errorSelf: You can't use your own code.
redeem.errorCycle: This code can't be used with your account.
redeem.errorAlreadyRedeemed: You already have an active referral code.
redeem.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmDelete.title:
Delete this
referral code?
confirmDelete.description: You'll no longer benefit from this code on your future purchases. You can add a new one at any time.

transferEmpty.title: You don't have any money to transfer yet
transferEmpty.description: Share products with your friends to start earning money.

pendingGains.subtitle: Pending earnings
pendingGains.heading:
Great news!
Money is waiting for you.
pendingGains.description: A purchase through your link earned you rewards. Collect them now into your wallet.

pendingEmpty.title: You don't have any earnings yet
pendingEmpty.description: As soon as a purchase is made through your sharing link, your earnings will appear here.

transferredEmpty.title: You haven't transferred any earnings yet
transferredEmpty.description: The total of your earnings will appear here once you make a transfer to your bank account.

transferModal.title: Transfer
transferModal.description: Choose one of the following options to transfer your earnings.

wallet.activateNotifications: Turn on notifs to track your earnings in real time.
wallet.manageNotifications:
Manage notifications
Open settings to control your notifications
wallet.installWebApp:
Install wallet on home screen
to find your gains at any time

invite.title: Invite friends, earn $5
invite.text: Earn $5 for each friend you invite. T&C apply

email.title: Sign in with your email
email.description: Enter the email linked to your wallet. We'll surface every passkey attached to it so you can pick the right one.
email.checkError: Unable to verify this email right now. Please try again.

notFound.title: No account found
notFound.description: We couldn't find a wallet linked to {{email}}. Want to create one with this email?

pendingReferral.success: You have claimed your reward successfully!
pendingReferral.text: You got {{eurClaimable}} EUR pending thanks to your referral activities!
pendingReferral.title: Pending referral reward

recoveryUsage.title: Recover your wallet
recoveryUsage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery link, if your wallet is set up for email recovery.

email.label: Email address
email.sent: If that email is registered and verified, we've sent your recovery link. Check your inbox.
email.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

blob.toggle: I have a recovery backup instead
blob.label: Recovery backup
blob.invalid: This doesn't look like a valid recovery backup. Make sure you copied the whole code.

password.title: Unlock your backup
password.description: Enter the recovery password you chose during setup. It never leaves this device.
password.invalid: That password doesn't match this backup.

validate.loadingDescription: Reading this wallet's recovery configuration on-chain…
validate.title: Confirm recovery
validate.description: Confirm to add a new passkey to this wallet. You'll be asked to create it on this device.
validate.failedDescription: Something went wrong while recovering your wallet. You can try again.
validate.cancelledDescription: You cancelled the prompt. You can try again whenever you're ready.

notConfigured.title: No recovery on this wallet
notConfigured.description: This wallet doesn't have recovery enabled, so it can't be recovered with a backup.

guardianMismatch.title: Backup doesn't match
guardianMismatch.description: This backup belongs to a different recovery setup than the one configured on this wallet.

tooEarly.title: Not available yet
tooEarly.description: For your security, this wallet can only be recovered from {{date}}. Please come back then.

expired.title: Recovery expired
expired.description: This recovery expired on {{date}}. Set up recovery again from a logged-in device to get a fresh backup.

success.title: Welcome back
success.description: Your new passkey has been added and your wallet is recovered. You're now signed in.

password.title: Protect your recovery
password.description: Choose a password to encrypt your recovery backup, and optionally control when it can be used.
password.label: Password
password.startHelp: Recovery can only be used after this date. Defaults to one week from now as a safety delay.
password.endHelp: Recovery stops working after this date. Defaults to and is capped at two years from now.
password.dateRangeError: The start date must be before the end date.
password.warning: Choose a strong password. We can never reset or recover it — if you forget it, your backup is permanently useless.

sign.title: Authorize recovery
sign.description: Confirm to enable recovery on your wallet. This creates your recovery key and registers it on-chain.
sign.failedDescription: Something went wrong while enabling recovery. You can try again.
sign.cancelledDescription: You cancelled the authorization. You can try again whenever you're ready.

backup.title: Save your backup
backup.description: This is your encrypted recovery backup. Keep your own copy somewhere safe, like a password manager.
backup.warning: Anyone who has both this backup code and your password can take full control of your wallet. Store them in separate places.
backup.saveError: We couldn't save your backup to our servers. Please retry before continuing.

success.title: Recovery is set up
success.description: Your wallet recovery is now active and your encrypted backup is saved.

config.title: Recovery
config.description: Recovery lets you restore your wallet if you lose access to this device.
config.refreshDescription: Keep your current recovery key and move its validity window, or replace it with a brand new one.
config.deleteDescription: Turn recovery off completely. Your recovery key is disabled on-chain and your encrypted backup is deleted.
config.testDescription: Check that you still remember your recovery password. It never leaves this device.
config.testInvalid: That password doesn't match your backup.

refresh.replaceNote: This replaces your current recovery key and password. Your old backup stops working once you authorize the change.
refresh.signDescription: Confirm to replace your recovery key on-chain. Your previous key stops working immediately.
refresh.successDescription: Your new recovery key is active and your previous backup has been replaced.

password.title: Confirm your password
password.description: Enter your recovery password to keep your current recovery key. It never leaves this device.
password.invalid: That password doesn't match your backup. If you've lost it, create a new recovery key instead.

dates.title: Update validity dates
dates.description: Choose when your recovery can be used. Your recovery key stays the same.

confirm.title: Confirm the new dates
confirm.description: Confirm to update your recovery validity on-chain. Your recovery key stays the same.
confirm.failedDescription: Something went wrong while updating your recovery. You can try again.
confirm.cancelledDescription: You cancelled the authorization. You can try again whenever you're ready.

success.title: Validity updated
success.description: Your recovery validity dates are now updated on-chain.

password.title: Confirm your password
password.description: Enter your recovery password to confirm you want to delete recovery. It never leaves this device.
password.invalid: That password doesn't match your backup. Enter the correct password to delete recovery.

confirm.title: Delete recovery
confirm.description: This disables your recovery key on-chain and deletes your encrypted backup. This can't be undone — you'll have to set recovery up again from scratch.
confirm.warning: Once deleted, your current recovery key and backup stop working permanently. You can set up a new recovery anytime.
confirm.failedDescription: Something went wrong while deleting your recovery. You can try again.
confirm.cancelledDescription: You cancelled the authorization. You can try again whenever you're ready.

success.title: Recovery deleted
success.description: Your recovery key has been disabled on-chain and your encrypted backup has been deleted.

button.alreadyRegistered:
You already have a wallet on your device

button.create: Create your wallet * in a second with biometry
button.error: Error during registration, please try again
button.inProgress:

register.notice: <sup>*</sup>encrypted digital account where you can find all the content you own, your consumption data and the rewards you earn

registerDemo.title: Try Frak in demo mode
registerDemo.description: Spin up a temporary wallet to explore Frak. No biometrics, no recovery, just a sandbox.

button.error: Error during registration, please try again

tokens.amountLessThanBalance: Amount must be less than balance

welcome.text: This wallet will enable you to collect all the rewards and much more.

notifications.title: Don't miss any earnings!
notifications.description: Enable notifications to track your earnings in real time.

invite.title: Invite your friends to Frak
invite.check3: Earn money on every purchase made across all partner sites.

detail.step1Description: Discover products to recommend to your friends and family.
detail.step2Title: Share an article with your friends

detail.step3Description: Transfer your earnings to your bank account with just one click.

pairing.title: Confirm device pairing
pairing.text: You're about to connect a device to your account.
pairing.code: Check that the code is correct
pairing.scanDescription: Scan this QR code to sign in from your mobile.
pairing.noCodeNotice: Confirm this pairing request to continue.

error.title: Invalid pairing request
error.notFound: Pairing request not found or expired

switchPasskey.title: Different passkey required
switchPasskey.description: This pairing was started with another passkey from your wallet. Switch to it on this device to continue.

state.retryError: Error when connecting to the paired device

requests.connecting: Open your paired device to proceed to the transaction
requests.paired: Wait for partner to process signature

error.title: Couldn’t connect
error.description: Something interrupted the pairing. Please try again.

signatureRequest.title: Signature request
signatureRequest.description: A device <strongFrom>{{from}}</strongFrom> is requesting your signature

banner.title: Another device is waiting for your signature

inAppBrowser.title: Open in your browser
inAppBrowser.description: For a better experience, open this page in your default browser.
inAppBrowser.warning: You're using an embedded browser. Your experience may be degraded. Tap to open in your browser.
inAppBrowser.clickToOpen: Tap to open in your browser.
inAppBrowser.clipboardAlert:
This browser doesn't support all features needed.

The link has been copied to your clipboard.

To continue:
1. Open Safari
2. Tap the address bar
3. Paste and go
inAppBrowser.clipboardManualAlert:
This browser doesn't support all features needed.

Automatic copy failed.

Copy this link manually:
{{url}}

Then:
1. Open Safari
2. Tap the address bar
3. Paste and go

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Some features may be unavailable until your connection is restored.

sessionExpiring.title: Session expiring soon
sessionExpiring.banner: Refresh now to stay signed in.

reauth.title: Session expiring
reauth.description: Please verify your identity to continue.

distantReauth.title: Reconnect your wallet
distantReauth.description: Your paired session expired. Scan with your phone to reconnect the same wallet.
distantReauth.pairing: Scan with the phone holding your passkey to reconnect the same wallet.

toastLoading.stuck:
Stuck? See the Troubleshooting section for more information.

You can try to .
(this will logout and you will need to redo a login / pairing)

openLogin.webauthnNotSupported: WebAuthn is not supported on this device

settings.title: Biometric Lock
settings.description: Require biometric authentication to access your wallet
settings.notAvailable: Biometrics not available on this device

notAllowed.title: Authentication cancelled
notAllowed.message: The passkey prompt was closed or timed out before the operation completed.

userOperationExecution.title: Transaction failed
userOperationExecution.message: An error occurred while executing the transaction. Please try again.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.message: An error occurred. Please try again.

alreadyRegistered.title: Already have a passkey
alreadyRegistered.message: This device already has a passkey for your account. Try logging in instead.

noCredential.title: No passkey found
noCredential.message: No passkey was found on this device. Create one, or sign in on the device where you registered.

noScreenLock.title: Screen lock required
noScreenLock.message: Your device needs a screen lock (PIN, pattern, or biometrics) to use passkeys. Add one in your settings, then try again.

unsupported.title: Passkeys unavailable
unsupported.message: Passkeys can't be used on this device right now. Make sure your passkey provider is set up, or try another device.

syncFailed.title: Passkey sync issue
syncFailed.message: Your phone couldn't complete the passkey step. This is usually a Google Password Manager sync issue on this device — not a problem with your account.
syncFailed.step1: Open your phone Settings, make sure Google Password Manager is the active passkey provider and that passkey sync is turned on.
syncFailed.step2: Update Google Play Services, then restart your phone and try again.
syncFailed.step3: Still stuck? Sign in on another device, or recover your wallet from the settings.

recoveryCode.title: Recover your code
recoveryCode.description: Paste the code copied from wallet.frak.id to recover your earnings.

error.invalid: Incorrect or expired code, check the code copied from wallet.frak.id
error.alreadyLinked: This code has already been used.
error.generic: Something went wrong, please try again.

success.title: Your referral link has been found!
success.description: You'll receive a notification as soon as a friend purchases via your link.

installCode.title:
Don't lose your {{ estimatedReward }}!
Copy this code
installCode.description: Paste it when opening the app. It will let you claim your rewards once logged in.
installCode.error: Failed to generate code. Please refresh.
installCode.infoDescription: When opening the app, tap <1>"I have a recovery code"</1>.

one.title: Earn money by recommending
one.description: Share your favorites and earn money for every purchase you help generate.

two.title: Your earnings in real time
two.description: Track your earnings and transfer them to your bank account whenever you want.

email.title: Enter your email address
email.description: Your email is only used to recover your account if you forget it. It will never be used to send you unsolicited messages.
email.label: Email

alreadyUsed.title: You already have a wallet
alreadyUsed.description: {{email}} is already linked to a wallet. Log in with biometrics to access it, or recover your wallet if you can no longer log in.

email.checkError: Unable to verify this email right now. Please try again.

keypass.title: Secure your account
keypass.description: A secure key is saved in your password manager to quickly log in via biometrics.

unsupported.title: Browser not compatible
unsupported.description: Your browser does not support biometric authentication. Log in another way to access your wallet.

existingAccount.title: Welcome back!
existingAccount.description: You already have an account. Log in with your passkey to access your wallet.

notification.title: Don't miss any reward!
notification.description: Get notified as soon as money is credited to your wallet.
notification.descriptionHighlight: Track your rewards in real time.

referral.title: Add a referral code
referral.description: Got a creator code? Enter it here. Otherwise, you can skip this step.

welcome.title: Welcome to your wallet

welcome.descriptionHighlight: Your earnings are secure and accessible at any time.
welcome.legal: By continuing, you accept our <termsLink>Terms of Use</termsLink> and our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>

badge.notLinked: IBAN not linked to this wallet

offramp.noIban: No IBAN linked. Please complete Monerium verification first.

callback.cancelledDescription: You can reconnect to Monerium whenever you're ready.

info.title: Complete your account to claim your earnings.

kyc.title: Complete your identity verification

kyc.notice: This step is quick and secure.
kyc.featureDescription: To secure your account and confirm that you are the rightful owner of the earnings, we use a financial partner, Monerium.

link.title: Link your wallet

link.featureTitle: Link your Monerium account to your wallet
link.featureDescription: To fully use your wallet, we need to link your account.

success.title: You can now transfer your earnings 🎉

available.title: A new version is available
